projects.name: Go Student Classroom
projects.tagline: Full-stack online learning platform with role-based dashboards and payments
projects.description: A comprehensive online classroom platform built with the MERN stack. Features role-based dashboards for students, teachers, and admins, secure Firebase authentication, teacher request management workflows, and Stripe-powered payment processing for course enrollment.
highlightFeatures: One adaptive dashboard shell that reconfigures itself per user type (student/teacher), instead of maintaining separate codebases for each role — less duplication, easier to extend.
Payment completion and enrollment status stay in sync automatically via TanStack Query cache invalidation — no "did my payment actually go through" limbo screen.
Took a three-sided platform (student, teacher, payments) from zero to fully working in a 7-day solo build.
challenges: Coordinating three distinct dashboard permission levels without duplicating component logic — solved by creating a unified permission hook and conditional rendering system
Keeping Stripe payment state synchronized with enrollment status across frontend and backend
Implementing proper cache invalidation with TanStack Query after payment completion to reflect updated enrollment immediately
improvements: Implement server-side route guards to complement client-side protection
Replace polling with webhook-driven Stripe status updates
Add automated end-to-end tests for the payment flow
Build a course content management system for teachers

projects.name: Sian Boutique
projects.tagline: Modern e-commerce storefront with real-time updates and smooth interactions
projects.description: A full e-commerce storefront with product browsing, search, advanced filtering, and order management, backed by dynamic APIs and Firebase auth.
highlightFeatures: A multi-attribute filter engine (price, size, category, and more, combined) that stays fast as the catalog grows — not a single dropdown pretending to be a filter system.
Orders update live the moment they change, no page refresh — the storefront and the order pipeline stay in sync in real time.
Product browsing tuned with Framer Motion so the carousel feels like a native app interaction, not a bolted-on template slider.
challenges: Building filter logic that stays performant as the product catalog scales — implemented client-side filtering with memoization
Preventing Glide.js carousel and Framer Motion transitions from conflicting on mobile touch events
Managing complex state for cart, filters, and search simultaneously without prop drilling
improvements: Implement server-side pagination for large product catalogs
Build a complete cart and multi-step checkout flow
Add wishlist functionality with user persistence
Implement inventory tracking and out-of-stock indicators

projects.name: My Drive
projects.tagline: Cloud file hosting with real-time sync and custom drag-and-drop
projects.description: A cloud-based file hosting and sharing platform with drag-and-drop uploads, folder organization, and file activity tracking. Powered by Firebase Storage and Realtime Database.
highlightFeatures: Nested folder hierarchies sync in real time through Firebase — move or rename a file and every open view updates instantly, no manual refresh or polling.
Drag-and-drop upload flow built from scratch (not a wrapped library) — handles multi-file drops, per-file progress, and folder targeting.
A file-activity trail showing exactly when and where each file was touched — a layer of visibility most weekend-project drive clones skip entirely.
challenges: Structuring Firebase's Realtime Database to handle deeply nested folder hierarchies efficiently
Handling large file uploads without blocking the main UI thread
Implementing proper loading states and progress indicators for concurrent uploads
improvements: Implement chunked and resumable uploads for large files
Add shareable links with configurable expiration dates
Build a storage quota system with usage visualization
Add file version history and restore functionality
